prompt: Translate source.md from English into Korean and write the complete translation to translation.md. Requirements: 1. Use the renderings in GLOSSARY.md for every occurrence of the listed terms, with no variation anywhere in the document. 2. Preserve the document structure exactly: the same number of headings and the same number of bullet items, in the same order — do not merge, split, drop, or add bullets. 3. Keep placeholder variables in curly braces (like {ticket_id}) byte-identical, never translated. 4. Preserve every number, date, version, percentage, and unit exactly. 5. Write natural, formal business Korean with a consistent register throughout; the meaning must be faithful, including negations and exceptions. 6. The product name RelayDesk stays in English. Do not modify source.md or GLOSSARY.md. Your translation will be graded by a hidden checker on structure counts, glossary consistency, placeholder integrity, and number preservation.
